requirements.requirement: User accesses the portal through authentication with personal credentials.
System displays the list of applications to which the user has access upon logging in.
User accesses applications from the portal list; if accessing only one application, they are redirected to its main page; if multiple, they select the application to access.
System restricts data visualization and actions (create, modify, delete) based on the roles assigned to the user.
System guarantees that users cannot access data belonging to other clients; only data of the associated client is shown.
System converts any mention of the old name to the new name wherever it appears on screens and in data.
Administrator assigns or revokes application access for users via the Commercial Cloud application.
Primary keys must be defined for User, Language, ClusterType, Application, Authority, Role, Brand, and Cluster tables.
Each language_id in every content table must belong to an existing Language.
Dates must be valid and cannot be later than the present.
There cannot be elements of the same type with the same code in applicable tables.
Authorizations and Cluster assigned to a user must be of the same Cluster type as the user.
Authorizations assigned to a user must belong to some of the brands contained in the associated Cluster.
New content must maintain visual coherence with the design of the old application version (design, colors, typography, organization).
System must be easy to use for any user (80% of users do not need to ask for help from a third party).
Application must be available in several languages with complete and correct translations.
User must be able to perform new operations without special training (learning time should not exceed 5 minutes).
Query operations must have a load time under 1 second (response time must not exceed 1 second in 95% of queries).
Web application must guarantee continuous and stable operation with a minimum availability of 99.9%.
Web application must support a large number of simultaneous users without degrading its performance.
System must allow creation, query, modification, and deletion of data to authorized users via a secure authentication and permission verification mechanism.
Application must manage a strict separation of data for each client (no user can access data of other clients).
Project utilizes Cloud technology model for storage and resource management.
Application architecture is based on microservices.
Cloud provider for the project is Amazon Web Services (AWS).
Frontend is developed using Angular (Single-Page Application).
Backend is developed using Spring Boot exposing a REST API.
Communication protocol is HTTP and data format is JSON.
Repository management follows the Gitflow methodology.
Deployment is performed using Amazon EKS (Kubernetes).
